title: Struct seeding and unit_path_key path coherence
body:
Analysis/codegen infra for struct definitions and coherent unit path keys across assembly, resolve collect, and codegen lowering.

## What shipped

- `seed_struct_definitions` and scoped call tables in [`context.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_analysis/src/types/context/context.rs) / [`items.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_analysis/src/types/context/items.rs)
- `unit_path_key` normalization in [`paths.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_analysis/src/paths.rs) at assembly, record, resolve, and codegen boundaries
- `scoped_call_kinds` support in link plan for Capabilities/Terminal subgraph

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`86a122d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/86a122d)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-05

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
